report.summary: Day 52 standup v7: Full 6-agent rotation since v6. Build-2 created Hyperliquid ecosystem page ($2.9T volume deep-dive) + Crypto Oracles guide (Chainlink vs Pyth vs API3). Publish promoted Monad + Smart Wallets → 395 published slugs. Design polished both queue pages (BackToTop, a11y, FAQ schema). Community-v5 drafted FOMC Decision Day social suite + Solana×Mastercard narrative. EOD-v4 confirmed 395 slugs, 2 new in queue (Hyperliquid + Oracles). BTC $75,273 (+0.01% from v6). FOMC rate decision TODAY 2pm ET. Git locks 19h+ stale, 552 uncommitted files. 29 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v6 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 394 entries in code (grep count), EOD-v4 reports 395 published slugs. Publish cycle promoted Monad + Smart Wallets since v6. PUBLISH_QUEUE now holds 2 NEW pages: /ecosystem/hyperliquid + /learn/crypto-oracles-guide-2026 (built by build-2 this cycle).

Page creation velocity: 2 major pages built this cycle — Hyperliquid ecosystem (full rewrite from stub to ~250-line guide with $2.9T volume data, tokenomics, fee tiers, risk analysis, competitor comparison) + Crypto Oracles guide (~300 lines, Chainlink/Pyth/API3/RedStone deep-dive with 5-column comparison table).
BTC PRICE: $75,273 (+0.01% from v6's $75,272). Stable consolidation above $75K ahead of FOMC. 24h vol $62.2B. +25% from Feb $60K bottom. +3.8% 24h. Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear).

FOMC: Rate decision TODAY at 2pm ET. 92%+ hold probability at 3.50-3.75%. This is THE peak search traffic window — FOMC guide + tax guide + DCA calculator should see maximum organic volume today/tomorrow.

NEW NARRATIVES SINCE v6: Solana joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program (institutional payments adoption). Bybit launches AI Skills (253 API endpoints, autonomous trading agents). Tokenized gold trading surging. $540M liquidations in 24h (shorts squeezed).

Content pipeline: 8 learn guides built today (Runes, Farcaster, Stacks sBTC, Liquid Restaking, Monad, Smart Wallets, Hyperliquid, Crypto Oracles). 2 promoted to production, 2 in queue, 4 built but not yet queued.
API routes: 5/6 public data routes healthy (unchanged). defi-yields still weakest (no fallback). 2/14 routes have rate limiting.
Git: HEAD still at cb65a9d (Day 42, ~21h ago). 552 uncommitted files (+2 from v6). Both .git/index.lock and .git/HEAD.lock still present — now 19h+ stale.

sections.title: Project Manager — Status Since v6
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6 agents): publish → build-2 → design → community-v5 → eod-v4 → this standup-v7. Every agent type ran since v6.

SHIPPED SINCE v6: Monad + Smart Wallets promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (395 total slugs). Vercel redeploy triggered (7nbQ4vD9K). Hyperliquid ecosystem page rebuilt from stub to comprehensive guide. Crypto Oracles learn guide created from scratch. Both queue pages UX-polished (BackToTop nav, 12px font a11y fix, FAQ structured data corrected). FOMC Decision Day social card created. Full social content suite drafted (4 tweets, 5-post FOMC thread, Discord/Telegram, newsletter). EOD QA audit passed.

BLOCKER P0 (7th consecutive standup): Git lock files — HEAD.lock ~19h, index.lock ~17h. 552 uncommitted files. ONLY Jefe can fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 2-minute fix blocking all deploys.
BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial status unknown/critical. If expired, 395+ pages are dark during FOMC Decision Day — the highest organic search traffic moment of the week for crypto content.

CARRY-OVER P1: 102 phantom published slugs (no page.tsx). 2 real TS errors in crypto-index-funds-guide. 12/14 API routes missing rate limiter. ~155 pages missing OG metadata. structured-data.examples.ts rename needed.
QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages ready to promote (Hyperliquid + Oracles). Promotion blocked by git locks.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 29 agent reports. 8 learn guides built. 2 pages promoted to production. 8 pages UX-polished. 5 SVG social cards created. 5 social content suites drafted. 4 full QA audits.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION (CRITICAL, 7th consecutive standup): Remove git locks + resolve Vercel billing. 552 files trapped. FOMC rate decision is TODAY at 2pm ET — if Vercel trial expired, our FOMC guide + all 395 pages are dark during peak crypto search volume. BTC at $75,273 driving organic search spikes. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 52: batch commit' && git push. Combined fix time: ~2 minutes. Compounding SEO loss every hour.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE HYPERLIQUID + ORACLES: Queue has 2 fully built, UX-polished pages ready. Hyperliquid ($2.9T volume, 70% perp DEX market share) and Crypto Oracles (Chainlink vs Pyth vs API3) target high-value 2026 keywords. Promotion blocked by git locks — once P1 is resolved, run immediate publish cycle to push 395→397.

PRIORITY 3 — FIRE FOMC CONTENT NOW: Community-v5 has the full content suite staged — FOMC Decision Day social card, 4 tweets, 5-post FOMC thread, Discord/Telegram update, newsletter draft for Thu. The pre-FOMC tweet and Solana×Mastercard tweets should go out THIS MORNING before the 2pm decision. This is a 24-hour window where crypto+FOMC search volume peaks.

STRATEGIC NOTE: The machine has now produced 29 reports and 8 learn guides in a single day. Content velocity is exceptional. But the git lock / Vercel blocker means zero new content has reached Google since Day 42 (21 hours ago). Every cycle of delay = compounding SEO loss on fresh, high-relevance content (FOMC, Monad, Smart Wallets, Hyperliquid, Oracles) during the single most news-heavy crypto day this week.
